meta.title: Ihe oru ngo ndi mmadu nwere ike inweta

hero.title: Ihe oru ngo ndi mmadu nwere ike inweta
hero.lead: Ndebanye aha a na-edepụta ọrụ ọha na eze na-elekọta site na IATF. A nabatara ọrụ nnweta, akụrụngwa saịtị, na prototypes echekwara na-ahụ anya ebe a.

intro: A na-edepụta ọrụ ndị a nakweere ebe a ozugbo e bipụtara ha.

header.title: Gbanwee mkpa a kapịrị ọnụ maka nnweta n'ime ọrụ ọha na eze

paragraphs: IATF na-enyocha mkpa nnweta dị mkpa nke nwere ike ịghọ ọrụ mepere emepe ọha na eze bara uru.

emptyState.title: E bipụtabeghị ọrụ ọ bụla
paragraphs: IATF na-akwadebe ya mbụ ọha oru ngo set.
Ị ka nwere ike iziga arịrịọ ma ọ bụrụ na i nwere mkpa doro anya maka nnweta.
